Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SHERYL NOEL, Esq. of Coleman & Horowitt, LLP (tel: 559-248-4820) for Plaintiff Wesco Insurance Company.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Upon Default Of Stipulation.

The Court states it has received notice of settlement of the case. Counsel Sheryl Noel confirms the case has settled. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and takes the matter off calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
